# Public mirror allowlist for Controlweaver (community/open source repository).
# One glob/path per line. Lines beginning with # are comments.
#
# This mirror includes core compliance management features:
# - Framework and control management
# - Assessment workflows
# - Auditor workspace
# - User and role management
# - Policy and POAM tracking
# - AI-powered analysis (with provider API keys)
# - Audit logging and notifications

# Top-level
README.md
LICENSE
QUICK_START.md
.gitignore
OPTIMIZATION_SUMMARY.md

# GitHub workflows and mirror config
.github/workflows/ci.yml
.github/public-mirror-allowlist.txt

# Public docs (free tier only)
docs/openapi.yaml
docs/POSITIONING_GUARDRAILS.md
docs/SMALL_START_DEPLOYMENT_PROFILE.md
docs/CONTENT_PACKS.md
docs/MCP_SETUP.md
docs/PUBLIC_MIRROR_SETUP.md

# Backend core files
backend/package.json
backend/apply-migration.mjs
backend/run-migration.js
